title: Plausible Clarifications of Implicit and Underspecified Instructions
description: Binary plausibility judgment for clarifications of underspecified or ambiguous instructions, determining whether a proposed clarification is plausible or implausible. Based on SemEval-2022 Task 7 (Roth and Anthonio).
citation:

    booktitle = "Proceedings of the 16th International Workshop on Semantic Evaluation (SemEval-2022)",
    year = "2022",
    publisher = "Association for Computational Linguistics",
    url = "https://aclanthology.org/2022.semeval-1.146"
